text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #13)
yes, I'm also interested in finding the cause of course...
for that we have to know the exact version ( Beta1, Beta4 or whatever)...
in other context there were bugs reported in the ML which appeared in Beta1 and were fixed in Beta4.
to be honest: I`m always on current(14 here) and didn't track all beta-versions.
if 14-current works for Eimar we could ignore the cause(because it's fixed then)
